title: CS50: Introduction to Computer Science
description: Harvard's introduction to the intellectual enterprises of computer science.

title: Introduction to Linux
description: Develop a good working knowledge of Linux using both the graphical interface and command line.

title: DevOps, DataOps, MLOps
description: Learn DevOps, DataOps, and MLOps with practical cloud projects.
prerequisites: Basic knowledge in the subject area recommended

title: Introduction to Cloud Computing
description: Develop foundational knowledge about cloud computing and its key technologies.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Learn Python and data science basics using real-world datasets.
prerequisites: Basic knowledge in the subject area recommended

title: Agile Software Development
description: Understand agile principles and apply scrum methodologies.

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Build understanding of cybersecurity threats and defenses.

title: Data Science: Machine Learning
description: Learn popular machine learning algorithms with HarvardX.
prerequisites: Basic knowledge in the subject area recommended

title: Introduction to Kubernetes
description: Learn how to containerize and deploy applications with Kubernetes.

title: Software Engineering: Introduction
description: Discover software engineering practices and how they are applied to real-world projects.
